creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> … Please visit http://www.truecrypt.org/downloads2 
> with a web browser and accept the License Agreement.
> Select the Mac OS X / Linux (.tar.gz) version …

Instead, maybe: 

<http://truecrypt.sourceforge.net/OtherPlatforms.html>

– or the direct link: 

<http://sourceforge.net/projects/truecrypt/files/TrueCrypt/Other/TrueCrypt-7.2-Linux-x64.tar.gz/download>

----

On the other hand, the initial redirection from <http://www.truecrypt.org/downloads2> to <http://truecrypt.sourceforge.net/> is useful because it begins with the red alert about non-security.
